questions.prompt:
An algorithm is required to count how many students pass an exam out of 20 students.

Write a Python program to:
  • prompt the user to enter each student's result as pass or fail
  • repeat this input process for 20 students
  • count how many students receive a result of pass
  • output the number of passes in an appropriate message
questions.explanation:
Format:
passes = 0
for i in range(20):
    result = input('Enter result: ')
    if result == 'pass':
        passes += 1
print('Number of passes:', passes)
